Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi B46 Bus Timetable Obada Bin Al Samit Mosque to Al Miqdad Al Kindy Mosque

July 11, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

One of the main routes is bus B46 which passes from Obada Bin Al Samit Mosque, to Al Miqdad Al Kindy Mosque, or through most of the city’s important places. A brief overview of the Bus B46 is presented, from operational timings, to major stops, to travel tips to make your journey smooth.

Contents

Operational Details

The intervals on bus B46 are reliable throughout the day so traveling is easy. Below are the detailed schedules for Bus B46, departing from both Obada Bin Al Samit Mosque and Al Miqdad Al Kindy Mosque:

From Obada Bin Al Samit Mosque From Al Miqdad Al Kindy Mosque
05:50 05:50
07:50 07:50
09:50 09:50
11:50 11:50
13:50 13:50
15:48 15:50
17:48 17:50
19:48 19:50
21:50 21:50

Bus B46 TimetableComplete timings can be checked on official website of AD Mobility or this link B46 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: The Hafilat Card is for paying for your journey. A single zone journey costs AED 2 and some extra if you are traveling a longer distance. You can easily recharge the cards at kiosks or online.

Route Overview

Bus B46 travels through a variety of key stops in the city, linking residential and commercial neighborhoods while passing by significant landmarks:

  1. Obada Bin Al Samit Mosque: The starting point, located near a historical mosque.

  2. Green Market: A local market offering fresh produce and goods.

  3. Al Wathba Municipality: A vital administrative hub for the region.

  4. ADNOC: Access to a major gas station in the city.

  5. Emirates Transport: A stop near an important transport facility.

  6. NMC Royal Medical Centre: A leading healthcare provider in the area.

  7. Al Ratl Street: A busy street with shops and services.

  8. Abdulla bin Rabee Mosque: A mosque offering cultural and religious significance.

  9. Hamza Bin Abdulmotalab Secondary School: A well-known educational institution.

  10. Municipal Market: A local market offering goods and services.

  11. Salama Bint Butti School: A prominent school in the area.

  12. Street 14: A key residential and commercial street.

  13. Public Emergency & Safety Department: A facility dedicated to public safety services.

  14. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall South/North: A major shopping mall with retail and dining options.

  15. Street 13: A central road connecting various areas.

  16. Al Jubour Street: A bustling street with businesses and residential units.

  17. Etisalat: A stop near a telecommunications provider.

  18. Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank: An important financial institution.

  19. Souq: A traditional market offering a variety of goods.

  20. Al ‘Azeeziyyah Street: A street known for residential and commercial establishments.

  21. Rabie Al Qubaisi Mosque: A mosque with cultural significance.

  22. Mafraq Dental Center: A healthcare facility specializing in dental services.

  23. Mafraq Hospital: A major healthcare center offering a wide range of services.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. New Al Mafraq Hospital Main Entrance: The main entrance to a major hospital.

  2. Al Aghsan Street: A street that connects various neighborhoods.

  3. Bani Yas International School: An international school serving the local community.

  4. Al Ikram Street: A key road in the area connecting to various destinations.

  5. Al ‘Adhamiyyah Street: A street known for residential properties.

  6. Al Ma’ajim Street: A road offering access to nearby areas.

  7. Emirates Market: A local market offering a variety of goods.

  8. Barakah Street: A residential street offering local amenities.

  9. Al Wasamah Street: A street that provides easy access to other parts of the city.

  10. Al Turoush Street: A busy street linking residential and commercial zones.

  11. Mohamed Bin Al Qasem School: A well-known educational institution in the area.

  12. Tawi Al Khusoub Street: A key road in the area.

  13. Al Rahhal Street: A street providing access to various destinations.

  14. Jamla Mohamed Al Muhairbi Mosque: A mosque with cultural and religious significance.

  15. Middle East Education Center: An educational institution in the area.

  16. Al Tawaf Street: A street connecting major neighborhoods.

40.

  1. Al Sha’ir Street: A prominent street offering access to various parts of the city.

  2. Al ‘Alameen Street: A street linking several important areas.

  3. Baniyas Sport Club: A popular venue for sports and community activities.

  4. Baniyas Sport Stadium: A stadium used for sporting events.

  5. Street 52: A key road offering connections to residential and business areas.

  6. Al Miqdad Al Kindy Mosque: The final stop, located near a significant mosque.

Other bus routes to check in Abu Dhabi are the R1 bus route that passes through stations from Al Wathbah (Razeen Workers City 3) to MBZ City Bus Station.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Some notable attractions along the B46 route include:

  1. Bawabat Al Sharq Mall: A great place for shopping and dining.

  2. Mafraq Hospital: A prominent healthcare facility in Abu Dhabi.

  3. Baniyas Sport Club: A hub for local sports and events.

Journey Experience

Starting in the Obada Bin Al Samit Mosque, the Bus B46 route to the Al Miqdad Al Kindy Mosque is a long journey but one that gives you an insight into Abu Dhabi.

It is also known as Abdulla bin Rabee Mosque, Bawabat Al Sharq Mall, Mafraq Hospital, Bani Yas International School.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 11, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej

Al Khaleej is the lead editor at Dubai Time — covering UAE transport, banking, visa services, and city guides. Trusted by residents and expats across the Emirates for accurate, up-to-date local information.
